products.title: Portable Handheld Fan Air Mate & 2200mAh Power Bank
products.body_html:
• Ultra Mini, Pocket-Sized: Mini Fan measures just 4.2 x 1.5 x 2.1 inches and weighs only 4.2 oz. Fits easily into any pocket, small purse, or backpack. Tuck it into your jeans pocket on a city walk, drop it in your tote for the office, or pack it in your carry-on for a trip.
  • Powerful Airflow of 36ft/s: Powerful fan is equipped with a 17,000 RPM high-speed brushless motor, generating a powerful airflow of up to 36ft/s. Whether you're on the go or enjoying time outdoors on a hot summer day, it will instantly bring you relief from the heat.
  • 2-IN-1 Detachable Modular: Compact handheld fan features a detachable fan head featuring a USB C port, compatible with iPhone 15, 16, and 17 series, iPad, and most USB C devices. Detach the handle to charge your phone, tablet, or any USB C device via the top port.
  • 4-Speed Control: Portable fan accessory features 4 adjustable speeds settings—from a gentle breeze to maximum 36 ft/s airflow. Perfect for focused work at your desk, relaxing on the couch, staying cool during outdoor activities, or instant refreshment after sports on a hot summer day.
  • 8.5 Hours of Cooling: Personal Fan built-in 2200mAh rechargeable battery provides up to 8.5 hours of continuous use on a single charge. Long commutes, road trips, beach days, or full workdays — stay cool from morning to afternoon without stopping to recharge

products.title: Portable Misting Fan Cold Air - World Cup Edition
products.body_html:
• 14.4°F Drop in Just 10s: Aecooly Cold Air Handheld Fan combines mist chill with high speed airflow to deliver a rapid cooling effect in just 10 seconds, helping lower skin temperature by up to 14.4°F so you can truly feel cool air on your skin, not just airflow. It is ideal for instant relief during hot weather, outdoor activities, commuting, or crowded environments when fast and noticeable cooling matters
  • Mist Chill Cooling: This Portable Fan is equipped with a mist chill system that uses High Pressure Micro Pore Atomization to generate millions of micron level micro mist particles per minute, delivering a finer and more refreshing cooling effect without feeling heavy. The ultra fine mist helps reduce stuffiness and improve overall airflow comfort in hot and dry or hot and humid conditions. One full refill provides up to 8 minutes of continuous mist chill cooling
  • Powerful Airflow 33 ft/s: This Hand Fan delivers high velocity airflow with speeds of up to 33 ft/s, providing strong and consistent wind that pushes cool air farther and cools more effectively. It quickly covers the face and neck area, offering noticeable cooling during workouts, travel, outdoor sports, or daily use
  • Up to 20H Long Battery Life: This Rechargeable Travel Fan features a built in 4500mAh battery and delivers up to 20 hours of runtime, reducing the need for frequent charging and keeping you cool throughout workdays, travel, camping trips, or outdoor events
  • 5 Adjustable Speed Levels: This Personal Fan features five adjustable speed levels that let you easily control airflow intensity. From a soft breeze for quiet environments to powerful airflow for extreme heat, one button operation makes switching simple and intuitive. At any speed level, press and hold to power off

products.title: Powerful Tower Fan Tower 02
products.body_html:
• High-Efficiency Cooling:This tower fan delivers precise, powerful airflow with sustained speeds of up to 2200 RPM and wind speeds of 20 feet per second, achieving rapid and uniform cooling to bring a strong, refreshing gust to your living space.
    • Precise Airflow, Full Coverage: This oscillating fan delivers 100 airflow options via 5 main settings with 20 fine levels each. Its 60° wide-angle oscillation ensures cool, comfortable air reaches every corner of the room.
    • Long-Lasting Battery Life: This desk fan features an 8000mAh battery, delivering up to 21 hours of continuous operation on a single charge. Whether placed in your bedroom, office, or outdoors, it provides a refreshingly powerful breeze whenever you need it.
    • Remote & Timer : This small table fan for bedrooms lets you adjust fan speed and timer settings from up to 5 meters away—no need to leave your bed or desk. The timer supports automatic shutdown, saving energy while ensuring a peaceful night's sleep.
    • Compact & Portable: This mini tower fan features a compact design, standing just 11 inches tall and weighing only 2.32 pounds, making it both space-saving and easy to move. It fits perfectly in various settings, including floors, desks, dining tables.
    • Ideal for Home Use or Gifting: Whether for personal use or as a thoughtful gift,it delivers personalized cooling whenever you need it, adding comfort and freshness to every moment of your life.

products.title: CamperKit
products.body_html:
• All-in-One Modular Camping Companion: CamperKit advanced camping companion includes a powerful main hub and 11 interchangeable modules: Jet Fan Mod, High-Speed Fan Mod, Camping Fan Mod, Ambient Light Mod, Camping Lantern Mod, Flashlight Mod, Alarm Mod, Water Pump Mod, Air Pump Mod, Charger Mod, and Arc Lighter Mod. Each module connects seamlessly to the main unit, allowing you to customize your setup for every outdoor situation.
  • Safety and Power Modules for Peace of Mind: The Alarm Mod keeps you alert in emergencies, while the Charger Mod functions as a reliable power source for phones or small devices. The Arc Lighter Mod ensures quick fire-starting for cooking or warmth. Together, they make every trip safer and smarter.
  • Lighting Modules for Ambience and Function: The Ambient Light Mod adds soft, mood-enhancing lighting to your setup, while the Camping Lantern Mod provides powerful illumination for outdoor activities. Use the Flashlight Mod for long-range visibility when exploring or walking at night.
  • Pump and Utility Modules for True Versatility: Handle water refilling, cleaning, and inflating with ease using the Water Pump Mod and Air Pump Mod. Whether you're setting up camp, washing gear, or inflating a mattress, these modules ensure convenience wherever you go.
  • Multi-Fan Cooling Modules for Every Situation: Stay cool anywhere with the Jet Fan Mod for maximum power, the High-Speed Fan Mod for balanced cooling, or the Camping Fan Mod for overhead airflow in tents or RVs. Built for comfort in all environments, from camping nights to summer road trips.

products.body_html:
Foldable Handheld Fan Pocket 01 Mirror

Aecooly Slim Portable Fan with Mirror, Thin Handheld Fan, USB Rechargeable Mini Personal [24H Max Cooling Time], Battery Powered Small Foldable Pocket for Travel, Lash, Makeup, Gifts for Women

  • Hidden Mirror Inside: Fan with a built-in hidden mirror—simply flip it open to check your makeup, fix your hair, or refresh your look anytime, anywhere. No need to carry an extra compact mirror in your bag. Perfect for travel, daily touch-ups, or on-the-go beauty moments (Remove the protective film on the mirror before use)
  • Slim & Elegant Design: Aecooly Slim Handheld Fan designed for ultimate portability, this fan features a remarkably slim profile and lightweight build. Its sleek and compact form fits effortlessly into your hand, bag, or pocket, combining practicality with modern aesthetics
  • Maximum 24H Battery Life: Thin Portable Fan Enjoy up to 24 hours of uninterrupted cooling on a single charge. Ideal for extended outdoor activities, travel, or daily use, ensuring you stay refreshed all day long
  • 3-Speed Adjustable Airflow: Small Personal Fan Customize your cooling experience with three speed options, from a gentle breeze to a powerful gust, perfectly tailored to meet your comfort needs
  • Handheld & Desktop Versatility: Foldable Pocket Fan Transition seamlessly between handheld portability and a stable desktop mode. The foldable design adapts to any setting, making it perfect for work, travel, or outdoor relaxation

products.title: Portable  Handheld  Fan Halo 02
products.body_html:
Portable  Handheld  Fan Halo 02

Aecooly 3 IN 1 Portable Fan, Turbo Handheld Fan, USB Rechargeable Mini Personal [22H Max Cooling Time], Battery Powered Small Foldable Pocket for Travel, Summer, Gifts

  • 3-in-1 Lifestyle: Aecooly Portable Halo Fan is designed for versatility—use it handheld, on a desktop, or hands-free with the neck strap. It effortlessly fits into your routine, whether you're commuting, working, or enjoying the outdoors
  • Dual-Ring Boosted Airflow: Powerful Turbo Fan channels wind through two synchronized outlets, utilizing a dual-ring system to deliver a more powerful and consistent breeze. Enjoy faster cooling and enhanced comfort with every use
  • Maximum 22H Battery Life: Handheld Travel Fan Enjoy up to 22 hours of uninterrupted cooling on a single charge. Ideal for extended outdoor activities, travel, beach, cruise or daily use, ensuring you stay refreshed all day long
  • 5-Speed Adjustable Airflow: Small Personal Fan Customize your cooling experience with 5 speeds options, from a gentle breeze to a powerful gust, perfectly tailored to meet your comfort needs
  • Thoughtful Gift Choice: Foldable Mini Fan Combining premium design and exceptional functionality, this fan makes a stylish and practical gift for any occasion. It's a thoughtful way to bring comfort and convenience to your loved ones

products.title: Handheld High-Speed Fan Aero Ultra
products.body_html:
Handheld High-Speed Fan Aero Ultra

Aecooly Portable Handheld Fan, Powerful Turbo Air Tube Fan, 19000 RPM High Speed Aero Pro, 15H Max Cooling Time, 6 Speeds Aluminum Case, Mini Pocket Design, for Travel Beach Outdoor Activities

  • Turbo Air Tube: Aecooly Turbo Handheld Fan features a streamlined tubular design that combines form and function. Its compact, elongated body offers a comfortable grip and easy portability, making it ideal for outdoor activities like hiking, beach days, or summer festivals. Equipped with a powerful turbine motor, it delivers high-speed airflow for rapid cooling on the go. Designed with both performance and style in mind, it enhances your outdoor comfort with efficient cooling and a modern aesthetic
  • Instant Cooling: Aecooly Mini Portable Fan powered by a robust Turbine Brushless Motor offers exceptional cooling performance with a maximum rotation speed of 19,000 RPM and wind speeds up to 11 m/s. It rapidly circulates powerful airflow, providing quick and efficient cooling, whether you're facing intense summer heat or seeking relief after exercise. The strong, invigorating breeze cools down your environment instantly, offering refreshing comfort that cuts through the heat
  • 6-Speed with Dual Modes: Aecooly Personal Fan offers six levels of airflow control, with a 4 speeds P-Mode delivering strong and steady airflow for a comfortable breeze, while the 2 speeds H-Mode provides even more intense, powerful cooling. Whether you need consistent airflow for a gentle breeze or rapid, high-intensity cooling, you can easily adjust the fan to your preferred setting for maximum comfort and efficiency
  • Smart Digital Display: Aecooly Rechargeable Travel Fan features a bright, intuitive LED display that allows you to easily monitor the settings with just a glance. The clear, user-friendly interface ensures you can adjust the speed, switch modes, or check battery life with ease. Whether at home, in the office, or outdoors, the LED screen offers clarity and simplicity
  • Perfect Gift Choice: With its elegantly crafted appearance and upgraded premium packaging, this mini fan is more than just practical—it’s a stylish gift that impresses at first glance. Whether for men or women, for birthdays, holidays, or summer surprises, it makes a thoughtful and visually stunning present for friends, family, or yourself
  • AeroGrade Aluminum: Aecooly Outdoor Beach Fan's durable aluminum alloy casing ensures longevity while adding elegance with its sleek finish. Lightweight yet strong, it withstands everyday wear and tear while maintaining aesthetic appeal. The premium aluminum shell also aids in heat dissipation, ensuring efficient operation and keeping the fan cool to the touch
  • Large Volume of Air: Aecooly Hand Small Fan is equipped with an innovative honeycomb air inlet design that significantly improves airflow efficiency by reducing air resistance. This design not only helps the fan to circulate air more effectively but also ensures a powerful and smooth flow, cooling down your environment quickly and consistently

products.title: Table  Fan Chic 01 Lite
products.body_html:
Aecooly Touch Control Desk Chic 01 Lite Fan, 100 Speeds Quiet Digital Display Small Table Fan, 4000mAh Battery Powered Desktop Fan for Bedroom, Bedside, Office, Travel

Table  Fan Chic 01 Lite

  • Smart Touch LED Screen: Aecooly Desk Chic 01 Lite Fan featuring an intuitive LED touch display, this fan allows for effortless control and seamless adjustments, giving you a modern and user-friendly experience at your fingertips
  • 100-Speed Precision Control: Aecooly Table Fan fine-tune your airflow with an impressive 100-speed adjustment range, allowing you to customize the perfect breeze for any situation, whether it’s a soft whisper or a powerful gust. Long press for 100-speed adjustment, increasing by 1 level per step; short press for 5-speed adjustment, increasing by 20 levels per step
